Task started: Audit apps/web/src/features for incomplete UI and broken flows

details.text: [ ] Audit each feature module for incomplete UI, broken flows, missing states
[•] Explore apps/web/src/features directory structure and list all feature modules
Now I have enough information to write the comprehensive audit report.
[✓] Explore apps/web/src/features directory structure and list all feature modules
[✓] Audit each feature module for incomplete UI, broken flows, missing states
- **13 feature modules reviewed** — all basic CRUD flows work with IndexedDB persistence
- **3 major missing features**: Onboarding, Article Library, Privacy page
- **5 features bypass SettingsContext** by reading `localStorage.getItem('ielts-settings')` directly
- **4+ features silently swallow DB errors** with `.catch(() => {})`
- **Timer useEffect duplication** in Reading and Listening practice
- **Mixed color system** — Tailwind utilities and CSS `var()` used inconsistently across features
- **Hardcoded seed data** embedded in grammar, reading, listening, writing, and speaking components

message: Task started: Audit packages/ for domain logic completeness and test coverage

details.text: [0m• [0mAudit test files in packages[90m Explore Agent[0m
[0m• [0mAudit utils, ui, theme packages[90m Explore Agent[0m
[0m✓ [0mAudit test files in packages[90m Explore Agent[0m
[0m✓ [0mAudit utils, ui, theme packages[90m Explore Agent[0m
All 9 domain packages under `packages/` were audited. Key findings:
- **`@ielts/content`** — content-type search filter is broken (always returns empty), zero schema validation used internally, silent error swallowing in import, DOM coupling in export
- **`@ielts/ui`** — entire package is dead code (zero consumers, zero tests)
- **`@ielts/utils`** — entire package is dead code (zero consumers, zero tests)

- **`@ielts/storage`** — 1 critical bug (`TopicProgressRepository.findByTopicId` queries non-existent index), `mistakeService.ts` is dead code on separate DB, `reviewService.ts` has race conditions, backup schema missing 2 tables
- **`@ielts/theme`** — flawed `adjustColorLightness` algorithm, missing `"use client"` directive, zero tests
- **`@ielts/exercises`** — hardcoded fake distractors, numeric/string type mismatch in scoring, `timeSpentSeconds` always 0, no try/catch in any scoring strategy
- **`@ielts/learning-engine`** — zero error handling or input validation anywhere, vocab/grammar skills always stubbed at 0, unused `zod` dependency
- **`@ielts/ai`** — `generateVocabularyDetails` bypasses adapter layer with raw fetch, no caching on 5/8 services, empty arrays pass AI response validation
Total: 75+ documented issues across **5 high/critical bugs**, **12+ high-severity gaps**, and **15+ dead-code items**.
- **`@ielts/ai-tutor`** — unsafe localStorage type assertion, dead `GENERATORS` export

message: Task started: Audit apps/web/src/routes and navigation for broken flows and missing states

details.text: Let me dive deeper into the route-related files to understand the full picture.
Now I have a thorough understanding. Let me write the audit report.
**3 missing routes** — onboarding, article library, privacy page (plus writing idea bank and study notes exist but aren't wired up)
**4 pages missing delete confirmations** — Vocabulary, GrammarNotes, MockTests, and Planner all delete immediately with no prompt.
**~6 state/validation gaps** — Settings/AISettings save buttons lack loading indicators, GrammarNotes form has no validation, PublicApiImportPage has no error boundary.

**15 dead files** — mostly `pages/*.tsx` that duplicate their `features/` counterparts (e.g. `pages/Dashboard.tsx`, `pages/Mistakes.tsx`, `pages/AITutorChat.tsx`). Also `features/analytics/Analytics.tsx`, `features/grammar/GrammarLearning.tsx`, `features/notes/StudyNotesPage.tsx`, `features/vocabulary/Vocabulary.tsx`, `features/writing/WritingPromptsPage.tsx`, and `features/settings/Settings.tsx` are all orphaned.

message: Task started: Audit apps/web/src/services/storage and extension scripts for persistence and extension feature completeness

details.text: [0m⚙ [0mcodegraph_codegraph_explore {"query":"storage service IndexedDB persistence chrome extension content script tooltip highlight word save article floating assistant popup settings YouTube transcript","maxFiles":30}
[0m⚙ [0mcodegraph_codegraph_explore {"query":"@ielts/storage initDb getDb safeDb AppDatabase repository findAll findById create update delete validation schema","maxFiles":10}
Now I have a thorough understanding of the codebase. Let me create the audit report.
Created `reports/audit-storage-and-extension.md` (179 lines, ~15KB). The audit found **50 issues** across the storage layer and extension scripts.
- **10 medium-priority**: content script lifecycle leaks, `DB_VERSION` brittleness, missing entity tests, dead code
- **3 critical**: no tests for extension storage/content scripts; `chrome.runtime.lastError` unchecked; `importJson`/`importEntries` missing try-catch
- **11 low-priority**: hardcoded CSS, `console.error` not behind debug flags, `as never` casts
- **7 high-priority**: word highlighting missing, YouTube transcript missing, 3 storage backends with no sync, no unified export/import

message: Task started: Audit AI integration and error handling in AI features

details.text: [0m• [0mFind AI features in web app[90m Explore Agent[0m
[0m✓ [0mFind AI features in web app[90m Explore Agent[0m
2. **High** — `AITutorChat.tsx` never calls an AI; all responses are hardcoded templates; Speaking/Writing/Reading feedback is rule-based word counting, not real AI
3. **High** — Legacy service functions return raw strings without Zod validation, pushing parse responsibility to UI components
4. **Medium** — No fetch timeout or `AbortController` support anywhere
7. **Medium** — No test coverage for any web-layer AI features
1. **High** — `apps/web/src/services/ai/AIService.ts` (490 lines) duplicates `packages/ai` — two parallel AI service layers with different patterns
6. **Medium** — Silent error swallowing in 3+ places in `AITutorChat.tsx`
5. **Medium** — AI error classes (`AIAuthError`, `AIRateLimitError`, etc.) defined but not consistently used across services

details.text: Let me check the remaining audit and build status:
Now I'll create the comprehensive implementation plan based on all audit reports.
[✓] Compile comprehensive implementation plan based on audit reports
The plan organizes ~100 actionable items across 6 phases:
- **Phase 1 (Critical Missing Features)**: Onboarding, Article Library, Exercise Center, Privacy page, missing routes
- **Phase 0 (Foundation Fixes)**: Storage layer bugs, missing error handling in business logic packages, `SettingsContext` migration, silent catch elimination
Created `plans/implementation-plan.md` — a comprehensive plan synthesized from all 5 audit reports.
- **Phase 3 (Medium Improvements)**: Zod runtime validation, exercise bugs, learning-engine stub values, form validation, AI settings polish, content script lifecycle, AI cache
- **Phase 4 (Tests)**: Unit, integration, E2E, extension, and web AI tests
- **Phase 2 (High-Priority Fixes)**: Dead code removal, confirmation dialogs, loading/error states, real AI for AITutorChat, extension storage unification, word highlighting, AI fetch timeout
Estimated total: ~144h across ~100 items, with clear dependencies and acceptance criteria for each phase.
